Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /Users/ertugrulsahin/Codalio/demo-project-v4/booking-app/bin/rails:
     1	#!/usr/bin/env ruby
     2	#
     3	# This file was generated by RubyGems.
     4	#
     5	# The application 'railties' is installed as part of a gem, and
     6	# this file is here to facilitate running it.
     7	#
     8	
     9	require 'rubygems'
    10	
    11	Gem.use_gemdeps
    12	
    13	version = ">= 0.a"
    14	
    15	str = ARGV.first
    16	if str
    17	  str = str.b[/\A_(.*)_\z/, 1]
    18	  if str and Gem::Version.correct?(str)
    19	    version = str
    20	    ARGV.shift
    21	  end
    22	end
    23	
    24	if Gem.respond_to?(:activate_bin_path)
    25	load Gem.activate_bin_path('railties', 'rails', version)
    26	else
    27	gem "railties", version
    28	load Gem.bin_path("railties", "rails", version)
    29	end
    30
